title: Durability Warnings (Best Tools)
description: Adds a clear visual alert when your tools or weapons are about to break (only best tools version)
body:
![Durability Warnings BT Modrinth Page 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/530c12d19da3a3cb8de63dea3810c4e4e72c84ce.png)

## Durability Warnings
Durability Warnings adds a clear visual warning when your tools are close to breaking.
When a tool reaches 90% damage, it begins to flash white, making it easy to notice even in the middle of combat or mining.
At 95–98% damage, the flashing becomes faster and turns red, signaling that the tool is on the verge of breaking and should be repaired or replaced soon.

The “Best Tools” version only modifies high-tier, end-game equipment — such as Diamond, Netherite, and other top-level tools and weapons.
If you want durability warnings for a wider range of items, you can download the full version of the resource pack (scroll down).

![Durability Warnings BT Modrinth Page 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e27709a51ae5603550b5267391d7e3106936af27.png)

Supported tools & weapons (as of the version 1.0.0):
- **Sword** (Diamond, Netherite)
- **Pickaxe** (Diamond, Netherite)
- **Axe** (Diamond, Netherite)
- **Shovel** (Diamond, Netherite)
- **Hoe** (Diamond, Netherite)
- **Spear** (Diamond, Netherite)
- **Trident** (**inventory-only** — does not flash while held or thrown)
- **Mace**

![Durability Warnings BT Modrinth Page 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/248006c99a8b745d56065d995fe429232f9ec77b.png)
### Durability Warnings (All Tools) Resource pack
**If you want more than just Diamond and Netherite tools, you can [download the full version](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/durability-warnings-(all-tools)) of the resource pack, which includes every tool in the game.**
